message:
Add Pad primitive with edge and interior padding support

Implement the Pad primitive across all crates:
- fj-core: add Pad variant to Primitive enum with as_str mapping and tests
- fj-lax: full eval_pad implementation supporting per-axis low, high, and
  interior padding for arbitrary-rank tensors, with validation tests
- fj-trace: shape inference for Pad with overflow-safe dimension calculation
- fj-ad: VJP and JVP stubs returning UnsupportedPrimitive for Pad
- fj-egraph: register Pad as unsupported in egraph lowering predicate
- fj-interpreters: partial eval output shape inference for Pad
- fj-conformance: add Pad to fuzz target primitive sampling, parameter
  generation, and arity table; also fix DynamicSlice/Iota/Clamp arity entries
- proptest_strategies: include Pad in arbitrary primitive generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -293,6 +293,7 @@ pub fn jaxpr_to_egraph(jaxpr: &Jaxpr) -> (RecExpr<FjLang>, BTreeMap<VarId, Id>)
             | Primitive::Transpose
             | Primitive::BroadcastInDim
             | Primitive::Concatenate
+            | Primitive::Pad
             | Primitive::Iota => {
                 panic!(
                     "primitive {} not supported by egraph lowering",
@@ -989,6 +990,7 @@ fn is_egraph_supported_primitive(primitive: Primitive) -> bool {
             | Primitive::Transpose
             | Primitive::BroadcastInDim
             | Primitive::Concatenate
+            | Primitive::Pad
             | Primitive::Iota
     )
 }
